must_rules_contains: Respect AGENTS.md instructions for touched files.
Keep changes consistent with the existing codebase.
Update documentation when the change affects usage or behavior.
Prefer existing repository lint/format scripts when validating changes.
must_not_rules_contains: Do not add dependencies unless necessary and justified.
validation_rules_contains: Describe or run the narrowest relevant validation for the change.
Prefer existing repository test scripts before inventing custom validation commands.
scope_guardrails_contains: Prefer the smallest change that solves the root problem.
